_comments.level_name: Outputs are written to a folder of this name.
_comments.landcover_grid / river_world: Paths (relative to this config) to the two files produced by build_inputs.py from your VibeUE export. See MapDesigner.md Stage 0.
_comments.layers: Map your exported weight-layer keys (L1..Ln) to the four design categories. 'flood' is your water/wet layer; 'forest' drives where strategic woods are seeded.
_comments.field_coverage / tree_coverage: MapDesigner.md target bands (% of play area). The script reports PASS/FAIL against these.
_comments.field_crop_threshold: Min crop-layer weight for a cell to be field-eligible. Lower = more fields.
_comments.forest_fringe_iters: Width of the young-growth treeline ringing each wood; raise to lift tree coverage without taking field.
_comments.road: main_verticals/horizontals = number of paved arteries; dirt_spacing_km = grid pitch; diagonals = extra non-grid connectors.
_comments.pois: target_count auto-scales with map area if you omit it; min_spacing_frac keeps POIs spread out (fraction of map span).
